items.title: Hash Tables
items.description: A Python dict is a hash table; the abstract data type page covers collisions, load factor and resizing in depth.

items.title: Sets
items.description: Sets are dicts without values — same hashing, used for membership and uniqueness.

items.title: Arrays & Lists
items.description: Lists give O(1) by *index*, dicts give O(1) by *key*. Pick the one that matches the access pattern.

items.title: collections & dataclasses
items.description: defaultdict, Counter and OrderedDict specialize the dict for grouping, counting and order-sensitive use.
